You can head below to browse through all the additional models seeing discounts starting from $150.

items.title: Save hundreds on Segway e-scooters during this Spring Sale event, like the Max G2 at $650 (Reg. $1,000), more from $150
items.summary:
Update: Segway has extended its Spring EV Sale event through April 5, 2026, giving you more time to jump on the hundreds in savings hitting the brand’s popular e-scooters!

Segway has launched its official Spring Sale with up to 55% discounts, giving folks even lower prices than its usual discounts so you can secure your new ride and start your spring adventures off right. One notable price cut is hitting Segway’s popular MAX G2 Electric Scooter and dropping it to $649.99 shipped, matching its Amazon pricing. You may see it bearing a $1,400 MSRP tag, but that rate is usually reduced to $1,000, with most of the discounts over the last year having kept prices above $750, with occasional drops to $700, less frequent falls to $650 (last seen during Christmas sales), and the one-time-only cut to a $530 that happened for a single day in December. Today’s deal gives you the next-best price from that low, saving you $350 off the going rate and even beating out its Black Friday pricing. Head below to learn why this model is so popular among riders, and also to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: This Qi2 15W 5K MagSafe power bank is the thinnest one in my EDC, and you can snag it for just $17 today, more from $5.50
items.summary:
We’re officially in Day 3 of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, and alongside the big-ticket tech deals, we’re also seeing some seriously solid savings on everyday accessories. LISEN’s official Amazon storefront is now offering notable discounts across its lineup of charging gear, car mounts, cables, organizers, and tablet accessories. Whether you’re upgrading your in-car setup, tidying up your desk, or simply stocking up on extra cables, there are plenty of practical options to consider. We’re seeing deals of up to 60% off, with prices starting from just $5.50 Prime shipped, making this a great time to grab useful essentials without stretching the budget.

One standout offer gets you the brand’s 15W Qi2-certified 5,000mAh MagSafe power bank for $16.99 Prime shipped when you apply promo code DN5EPS2U at checkout. This model typically sells for $30, so you’re looking at nearly 50% off. It’s also one of the thinnest power banks around, making it easy to carry daily, and the newer Qi2 support helps deliver faster charging compared to the standard version.

Running parallel to Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, Bluetti has launched the final phase of its own direct Spring Sale with increased discounts of up to 58% that is only running through the rest of March – plus, we have some exclusive bonus savings codes to give our readers even lower prices! One notable increase in savings from the previous phase is hitting Bluetti’s popular 2,764.8Wh Apex 300 Versatile Portable Power Station at $1,371.80 shipped, after using the code 9TO5TOYS5OFF at checkout, beating out its Amazon storefront pricing by $72. It may carry a $2,199 MSRP, but you can more often find it down around $1,699 these days. Discounts since its May 2025 release have mostly kept costs above $1,399, though there was a one-time $1,299 low that appeared during Black Friday. During the short window left, you can score the next-best price, courtesy of the $327 markdown off the going rate (and $827 off the MSRP). Head below to learn more, get our exclusive codes, and browse the full lineup of deals while they last through March 31, 2026.

This is originally a $700 laptop that has lately been fetching $750 at Best Buy, Amazon, and others, meaning you’re looking at a 46% discount on it right now. Today’s deal shaves $350 off its usual going rate, making this a great time to cash in. While the AMD-powered version of this 14-inch Vivobook has seen frequent discounts in the past, the Snapdragon X model featured here isn’t nearly as frequently marked down. It’s now fetching $20 more than its previous all-time low and our mention from last month when it hit the $380 mark as part of a similar daily deals offer, but still lands among the best prices we have tracked to date.

items.title: Lenovo’s Idea Tab Pro 12.7-inch 3K Android tablet with stylus delivers some serious value while it’s down to $237.50 (40% off)
items.summary:
Over at Lenovo, you’ll find the brand’s Idea Tab Pro Android tablet currently going for $237.49 shipped. Don’t forget to enter promo code EXTRAFIVE during checkout to see the discounted price. This particular tablet, which comes bundled with the Lenovo Tab Pen Plus stylus, typically sells for $390, so you’re looking at a straight-up $152 discount right now. We’ve typically see the brand’s more affordable Idea Tab models score notable price drops, but this Pro model doesn’t see nearly as many discounts. It’s only been discounted once in the past, and today’s offer beats that by $10 to mark a new best price. Best Buy currently lists this base variant for $310 with a lighter discount, but Lenovo’s offer with the above-mentioned promo code knocks a significant chunk off the regular price to land at a new all-time low.
